rows.label: tev079391_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hmm... Who could those kind and gallant
fellows possibly have been? *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_MSG0002
rows.name:
Ah, it's you, [ST:playername ]! *fsssh*
Perhaps you could help me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_MSG0003
rows.name:
I am trying to figure out the
identity of the Bias group
that saved my life. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_MSG0004
rows.name:
You see, until just recently,
I was prospecting for voltant
outside of the city. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_MSG0005
rows.name:
Unfortunately, I was spotted by
a band of Milsaadi who quickly
surrounded my trailer. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_MSG0006
rows.name:
But then a squad of pink-colored Bias
appeared from out of nowhere and thoroughly
pummeled my Milsaadi assailants! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_MSG0007
rows.name:
If it hadn't been for them, I'd never
have made it back to NLA alive. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_MSG0008
rows.name:
But Bias of that color are still
supposed to be loyal to the Growth.
*fsssh* Why would they rescue me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_JNK0010
rows.name: Suggest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell Horonalderon that he
should ask the Bias chieftain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_JNK0020
rows.name: Speculate[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell Horonalderon that he was
likely rescued by Team Slovity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_MSG0009
rows.name:
Their chieftain is Sevvy Belgazus,
I believe? *fsssh* Well, I
suppose that makes sense.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_MSG0010
rows.name:
Anyway, they ran off as quickly as
they had appeared. I didn't even have
a chance to thank them. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_MSG0011
rows.name:
It's possible that I simply didn't
perceive their color correctly.
Perhaps due to the sunset? *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_MSG0012
rows.name:
But thank you. I will bring a token
of appreciation to Sevvy Belgazus
and ask for his council. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_MSG0013
rows.name:
Perhaps that will lead to stronger
ties and deeper friendship between
the Bias and Zaruboggan. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_MSG0014
rows.name:
What?! There's a group of pink Bias that
have deserted from the Growth? *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_MSG0015
rows.name:
...And you say that they're now in NLA
fighting against the Growth? *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_MSG0016
rows.name:
Thank you so much! I will go
speak with them and bring a
token of my gratitude. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_MSG0017
rows.name:
The way those women fought was nothing
short of spectacular. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079391_MSG0018
rows.name:
I am eager to hear of the great
deeds this Slovity has achieved
from her own lips! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]
